description: Per-UI task list driving the fabric-parity-loop multi-agent workflow. Auto-generated by tools/gen-parity-tasks.mjs from registry.ts + wiring-audit.md. Hand-edits to existing entries preserved.

uis.name: notebook
knownGaps: Single textarea instead of cell-based editor
Missing language picker (PySpark/Spark Scala/Spark SQL/SparkR/Python/T-SQL)
Missing OneLake side panel with attached Lakehouse browser
Missing + Code / + Markdown hover insert between cells
Missing per-cell Run button + cell output display
Missing cell right-edge toolbar (Convert/Maximize/Copy/Edit/Lock/Delete)
Missing notebook tab strip (Home/Edit/AI tools/Run/View)
Missing History pane
Missing Connect dropdown (Attach Lakehouse / Warehouse / KQL DB)

uis.name: lakehouse
uis.azureBackend: ADLS Gen2 + auto-paired Synapse Serverless SQL Analytics Endpoint
knownGaps: No auto-paired SQL Analytics Endpoint (Fabric Lakehouse comes with one — Loom should auto-create a synapse-serverless-sql-pool sibling item)
No 'Open in notebook' button on table rows
No table preview as DataFrame.show()-style grid
No shortcut creation flow (mount external ADLS as virtual table)

uis.name: data-pipeline
knownGaps: No drag-and-drop visual pipeline designer (Fabric has Mapping Data Flow style canvas)
Only JSON-text editor for activity definition
No connector picker (Copy data / Web activity / Notebook / Stored proc / Foreach / etc.)
No real-time run debug view

uis.name: kql-database
knownGaps: No table schema browser sidebar (Fabric shows tables + columns + funcs)
No query history pane
No multi-query tab support
Results grid is plain — Fabric has column types, sort, filter, export, viz toggle

uis.name: warehouse
knownGaps: No object explorer with schemas/tables/views/SP tree
No table data preview in browser
No 'New SQL Query' tab spawn
Cold-resume UX could be better — currently 60s wait without progress

uis.name: semantic-model
knownGaps: No model schema editor (tables, columns, measures, relationships)
No DAX editor with intellisense
No data source connection wizard
No 'Refresh now' against the PBI dataset
No row-level security editor

uis.name: report
knownGaps: No embedded Power BI report (Fabric shows the actual report rendered inline)
Missing visual library picker (Bar/Line/Pie/Card/Slicer/etc.)
Missing fields pane
Missing pages tab

uis.name: dashboard
knownGaps: Same as report but for dashboard view

uis.name: eventstream
knownGaps: No visual stream designer (source → transform → sink canvas)
Refresh/Start/Stop runtime not wired to Event Hubs ingestion pipeline

uis.name: dataflow
knownGaps: Refresh runtime not wired
No Power Query M editor
No transformation designer

uis.name: mirrored-database
knownGaps: Start/Stop control plane not wired to mirroring engine
No source DB connection wizard
No table mapping UI

uis.name: ml-experiment
knownGaps: No runs comparison grid
No metric chart pane
No artifact browser

uis.name: ml-model
knownGaps: No version comparison
No 'Deploy' button to AML endpoint
No model card

uis.name: graphql-api
knownGaps: No GraphiQL playground tab
Schema editor is plain text — needs Monaco with GraphQL grammar
Publish doesn't expose a real endpoint yet
